name: azure-devops
description: Azure DevOps integration for Codex using Microsoft's local Azure DevOps MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Work with Azure Boards, Repos, and Pipelines
interface.longDescription: Bring Azure DevOps context into Codex through Microsoft's local Azure DevOps MCP server, with workflow guidance for projects, work items, pull requests, repositories, pipelines, wiki, test plans, and search.
defaultPrompt: List my Azure DevOps projects and assigned work items.
Summarize open pull requests for this Azure DevOps repo.
Check the latest Azure Pipelines run and explain failures.
